target: des mots de passe faibles et des failles dans les sites.

target: Hackers look for weak passwords and flaws in sites.

target: bloquent les données et demandent de l’argent pour les récupérer.

target: they block data and demand money to recover it.

context: Le 19.05.1994, je lis dans un journal technique une idée nouvelle sur l’argent et les réseaux informatiques. On parle d’une monnaie qui existerait seulement sur les ordinateurs et qui ne passe pas par les banques. C’est assez fascinant et un peu étrange. On imagine que des personnes peuvent payer des biens ou des
target: services en utilisant cette monnaie électronique, sans écrire de chèque ni dépenser des billets.

context: On 19.05.1994, I read in a technical journal a new idea about money and computer networks. They talk about a currency that would exist only on computers and would not go through banks. It is quite fascinating and a bit strange. One imagines that people can pay for
target: goods or services using this electronic money, without writing checks or spending notes.

context: Les responsables disent que ce système serait sûr s’il existe un registre commun et secret. Chaque paiement serait enregistré dans ce registre et il serait difficile de le modifier. Le registre serait partagé par plusieurs ordinateurs dans le monde, pour que tout le monde puisse vérifier les paiements.
target: Certains disent que cela peut éviter les frais et les retards des banques.

context: Officials say that this system would be safe if there exists a common and secret register. Each payment would be recorded in this register and it would be hard to modify it. The register would be shared by several computers around the world, so that everyone can verify
target: the payments. Some say this could avoid fees and delays from banks.

context: Les chercheurs parlent de mots techniques comme cryptographie, sécurité et réseaux. Ils se demandent comment empêcher les doubles paiements, c’est-à-dire payer deux fois le
target: même argent. C’est un grand défi.

context: Researchers talk about technical words like cryptography, security, and networks. They wonder how to prevent double payments, that is, paying the same money
target: twice. It is a big challenge.

context: D’autres questions apparaissent: qui fixe le cours de cette monnaie électronique, qui contrôle le système, et comment faire évoluer le réseau sans trop de frais? Quelques personnes évoquent aussi une idée appelée « chaîne » ou « chaîne de blocs ». Dans cette idée,
target: les paiements forment une suite et chaque paiement est relié au précédent.

context: Other questions arise: who fixes the value of this electronic money, who controls the system, and how to make the network evolve without too many costs? target: the previous one. This chain could serve as a common register for everyone.

target: pensent que l’idée ne va pas disparaître.

context: Dans les magasins et les gares, on voit déjà des services sans fil qui rendent les achats et les déplacements plus pratiques. Le chemin est long, mais en 2001 on peut croire que les technologies avancent et que, peut-être avant 2010, des essais de la 5G auront lieu dans quelques villes et pays. Si tout se passe bien, la 5G peut changer beaucoup
target: de choses pour les entreprises, les écoles et les familles, et rendre la vie plus connectée.

context: The expansion of telephone networks and Internet can also reduce costs and give new opportunities for education, work and daily life. In stores and stations, you can already see wireless services that make shopping and travel more convenient. The road is long, but in 2001 one can believe that technologies are progressing and that, perhaps
target: before 2010, trials of 5G will take place in a few cities and countries.

context: Le 8 juillet 2000, j'écris ces mots sur la réponse aux catastrophes et l'aide humanitaire. Quand une catastrophe frappe, les gens cherchent à sauver des vies. Les autorités, les secours et les organisations
target: humanitaires travaillent ensemble. Des équipes de secours arrivent rapidement.

context: On 8 July 2000, I write these words about disaster response and humanitarian aid. When a disaster strikes, people try to save lives. Authorities, rescue services, and humanitarian
target: organizations work together. Rescue teams arrive quickly.

context: Des médecins et des infirmières donnent des soins. Des bénévoles distribuent de l'eau potable et de la nourriture. On installe des refuges pour les familles sans maison. Dans les camps, on met
target: en place des toilettes, des lits et des couvertures.

context: Doctors and nurses provide care. Volunteers distribute drinking water and food. Shelters are set up for families without housing. In the camps,
target: toilets, beds, and blankets are installed.

context: On explique comment se laver les mains et comment boire de l'eau propre. Les enfants jouent un peu, mais les gens sont très fatigués. Les volontaires aident aussi à inscrire les
target: personnes sur des listes pour recevoir des aides.

context: We explain how to wash hands and how to drink clean water. Children play a little, but people are very tired. Volunteers also help to
target: register people on lists to receive aid.

context: Le travail continue jour et nuit, jusqu'à ce que la vie retrouve son rythme normal. Mais il y a des défis : le temps, la distance et les coûts rendent le travail difficile. Il faut aussi protéger
target: les personnes vulnérables, comme les personnes âgées et les malades.

context: Work continues day and night, until life returns to its normal rhythm. But there are challenges: time, distance, and costs make the work difficult. We must also protect vulnerable
target: people, such as the elderly and the sick.

context: L'information est importante : on donne des conseils simples pour rester en sécurité et pour se protéger contre les maladies. La coopération internationale est utile : les pays voisins envoient des ressources et des équipes. J'espère que l'aide arrivera
target: sans retard et que les familles pourront reconstruire leur vie.

context: Information is important: simple advice is given to stay safe and to protect against diseases. International cooperation is useful: neighbouring countries send resources and teams. I hope that aid will arrive without
target: delay and that families can rebuild their lives.

context: Le 13.10.2010, je lis des nouvelles sur les droits humains et les mouvements pour la justice sociale. Les droits humains disent que chaque personne mérite la liberté et l’égalité. Chaque pays peut vivre avec dignité: droit à l’éducation, à la santé, au travail, à la justice. Les gens veulent
target: parler librement, se réunir sans peur et prendre des décisions sur leur vie.

context: On 13.10.2010, I read news about human rights and movements for social justice. Human rights say that every person deserves freedom and equality. Every country should live with dignity: the right to education, health, work, and justice. People want to speak freely,
target: to meet without fear, and to make decisions about their lives.

context: Dans beaucoup de villes, des associations et des groupes pacifiques travaillent ensemble. Ils organisent des manifestations pacifiques, des réunions, et ils utilisent les réseaux sociaux pour partager des idées. Les familles s’informent sur les lois et les programmes qui aident les enfants, les femmes et les personnes handicapées. On parle aussi de la justice sociale: les richesses doivent être
target: partagées avec équité, et les personnes doivent recevoir un salaire juste et des services publics.

context: In many cities, associations and peaceful groups work together. They organize peaceful demonstrations, meetings, and they use social media to share ideas. Families learn about laws and programs that help children, women, and people with disabilities. We also talk about social justice: wealth should be
target: shared fairly, and people should receive a fair wage and public services.

context: Le travail des organisations non gouvernementales et des travailleurs sociaux est important: ils aident les moins favorisés, ils protègent les réfugiés, ils défendent les droits des minorités. Le droit international, comme la Déclaration universelle des droits de l’homme, guide les pays. Mais il y a encore des difficultés: la
target: peur, la discrimination et la violence font du mal à beaucoup de personnes.

context: The work of non-governmental organizations and social workers is important: they help the less fortunate, protect refugees, defend the rights of minorities. International law, such as the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, guides countries. But there
target: are still difficulties: fear, discrimination, and violence hurt many people.

context: C’est pourquoi des enfants, des jeunes et des adultes veulent un monde meilleur. Ils apprennent, ils parlent, et ils se mobilisent sans haine. En ce moment, on peut voir que les droits humains et
target: la justice sociale ne se réalisent pas tout seuls.

context: That is why children, young people, and adults want a better world. They learn, they speak, and they mobilize without hatred. At the moment, we can see that human rights and
target: social justice do not come true by themselves.

context: Il faut du courage, de la paix et de la coopération entre les pays. Quand les gens travaillent ensemble, on peut obtenir des changements: des lois plus justes, des écoles pour tous, et des soins pour tous. C’est une
target: période où l’espoir peut grandir si chacun fait sa part.

context: It takes courage, peace, and cooperation between countries. When people work together, changes can happen: fairer laws, schools for all, and care for all. This is a time when
target: hope can grow if everyone does their part.

context: Le 17 septembre 2021, je parle d'un sujet important: l'eau et sa gestion. Dans beaucoup de régions, l'eau manque. La pénurie d'eau est un problème pour les familles, pour les écoles et pour les fermes.
target: Les habitants doivent économiser l'eau et l'utiliser avec soin.

context: On September 17, 2021, I am talking about an important topic: water and its management. In many regions, water is scarce. Water scarcity is a serious problem for families, for schools, and for
target: farms. People must save water and use it carefully.

context: Pour gérer l'eau, on organise les ressources et les plans d'eau. Les villes construisent des stations pour traiter l'eau usée et la rendre propre.
target: On peut réutiliser l'eau après le traitement.

context: To manage water, we organize the resources and water plans. The cities build stations to treat wastewater and to make it clean.
target: Water can be reused after treatment.

context: On apprend à économiser l'eau à la maison. Fermer le robinet quand on se brosse les dents est un petit geste qui aide. Prendre
target: des douches plus courtes économise beaucoup d'eau.

context: We learn to save water at home. Turning off the tap when we brush our teeth is a small gesture that helps. Taking shorter
target: showers also saves a lot of water.

context: Réparer les fuites dans les tuyaux est important. Les familles peuvent récupérer l'eau de pluie pour le jardin et pour les tâches ménagères. Les écoles et les
target: médias montrent des gestes simples pour économiser.

context: Repairing leaks in the pipes is important. Families can collect rainwater for the garden and for household chores. Schools and the
target: media show simple actions to save.

context: Les agriculteurs utilisent un arrosage plus efficace et qui consomme moins d'eau. Les gouvernements donnent des règles pour limiter le gaspillage et protéger les ressources. Les entreprises et
target: les industries doivent aussi réduire leur consommation d'eau.

context: Farmers use more efficient irrigation that uses less water. Governments give rules to limit waste and protect resources. Businesses and industries
target: must also reduce their water consumption.

context: Nous devons apprendre, partager et agir ensemble pour une eau plus sûre et accessible à tous. Certaines villes interdisent le gaspillage d'eau dans les lieux publics. Les touristes
target: et les visiteurs doivent aussi respecter ces règles.

context: We must learn, share and act together for safer water that is accessible to everyone. Some cities ban water waste in public places. Tourists
target: and visitors must also respect these rules.

context: Heute, am 18. August 1999, schreibe ich über Philosophie und Ethik in unserer modernen Gesellschaft. Viele Menschen leben schnell, arbeiten viel und
target: denken oft an das eigene Glück.

context: Today, on August 18, 1999, I write about philosophy and ethics in our modern society. Many people live quickly, work a lot, and often think about their own happiness. At the same time, we wonder how to
target: live well when technology, media, and politics change so quickly.

context: Gleichzeitig fragt man sich, wie man gut leben kann, wenn sich Technik, Medien und Politik so rasch verändern. In der Schule, am Arbeitsplatz und zu Hause begegnen uns Werte wie Ehrlichkeit, Gerechtigkeit, Toleranz und Verantwortung. Die Philosophie hilft uns, diese
target: Begriffe zu erklären und zu prüfen, warum sie wichtig sind.

context: In school, at work and at home we meet values such as honesty, justice, tolerance and responsibility. Philosophy helps us explain these terms and to examine why they are important. Ethics means asking: What is
target: right, what is fair, what can we rely on?

context: Ethik bedeutet, zu fragen: Was ist richtig, was ist fair, worauf können wir uns verlassen? Im Alltag merken wir oft, dass Regeln nicht immer eindeutig sind. Dann muss man Entscheidungen treffen, zum
target: Beispiel beim Teilen von Zeit, Geld oder Informationen.

context: In everyday life we often notice that rules are not always clear. Then we have to make decisions, for example when sharing time, money or information. We live in a time when
target: the Internet creates new possibilities but also new risks.

context: Die Globalisierung verbindet Menschen auf der ganzen Welt, doch sie bringt auch Ungleichheiten mit sich. Wie können wir gerecht handeln, wenn Menschen unterschiedlich viel Macht und Geld haben? Viele Menschen hoffen, dass der Staat und die Gemeinschaft
target: helfen können, indem sie Bildung, Gesundheit und soziale Sicherheit sichern.

context: How can we act justly when people have different amounts of power and money? Many people hope that the state and the community can help by providing education, health care and social security. At the same time, individual freedom is also important: Everyone should make decisions that
target: align with their conscience, as long as they do not harm others.

context: Gleichzeitig ist auch die individuelle Freiheit wichtig: Jeder soll Entscheidungen treffen, die seinem Gewissen entsprechen, so lange sie anderen nicht schaden. In der Gegenwart diskutieren Professoren, Politiker, Journalisten und Bürger über Umweltfragen, über Klima, über die Zukunft der Arbeit und über den Schutz der Menschenwürde. Die Ethik der Moderne fordert
target: uns auf, kritisch zu bleiben, Sachen zu hinterfragen und andere Sichtweisen zu respektieren.

context: In contemporary discussions, professors, politicians, journalists and citizens talk about environmental questions, about climate, about the future of work and about the protection of human dignity. The ethics of modern times invites us to stay critical, to question things and to respect other viewpoints. Sometimes that leads to conflicts, but
target: conflicts can also lead to better solutions if we speak openly and listen.

context: Manchmal führt das zu Konflikten, doch Konflikte können auch zu besseren Lösungen führen, wenn man offen spricht und zuhört. Philosophische Gespräche helfen, Gemeinsamkeit zu finden, auch wenn man unterschiedlicher Meinung ist. So könnte unsere Gesellschaft wachsen, wenn jeder Verantwortung übernimmt, wenn
target: Bildung stärker wird und wenn Vertrauen zwischen Menschen und Institutionen wächst.

context: Philosophical conversations help to find common ground even when people disagree. Thus our society could grow if everyone takes responsibility, if education becomes stronger and if trust between people and institutions grows. And perhaps we realize that ethics is not an
target: old book, but a task that must be reconsidered every day.

context: Neue Geräte und Verfahren helfen Ärzten, Krankheiten besser zu erkennen und zu behandeln. Zum Beispiel gibt es heute modernere bildgebende Verfahren wie die Computertomographie (CT) und die Magnetresonanztomographie (MRT), die klare Bilder liefern. Die Behandlungsmethoden werden
target: oft schonender; minimal-invasive Operationen mit speziellen Instrumenten gewinnen an Bedeutung.

context: For example, there are now more modern imaging methods such as computed tomography (CT) and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), which provide clear pictures. Treatment methods are often less invasive; minimally invasive operations with special instruments are becoming more important. There
target: are also advances in medicines that we can use more targeted.

context: Es gibt auch Fortschritte bei Medikamenten, die wir gezielter einsetzen können. Elektronische Hilfen im Krankenhaus entwickeln sich: In einigen Städten werden elektronische Rezepte getestet, und man denkt über elektronische Patientenakten nach. Die Patienten können in manchen Fällen von zu Hause aus mit dem Arzt
target: sprechen, zum Beispiel telefonisch oder über das Internet – was Zeit spart.

context: Electronic tools in hospitals are developing: in some cities electronic prescriptions are being tested, and people think about electronic patient records. Patients can sometimes talk to doctors from home, for example by telephone or over the Internet – which saves time. Telemedicine is being tested especially in
target: rural regions so that people outside the cities have access to specialists.

context: Gleichzeitig ist es wichtig, die Privatsphäre der Patienten zu schützen. Die Politik diskutiert über Finanzierung, Versicherung und Kosten, damit Innovationen allen Menschen zugutekommen können. Viele Menschen hoffen, dass die medizinische Forschung ihnen in
target: Zukunft hilft, Krankheiten zu verhindern oder besser zu behandeln.

context: At the same time it is important to protect patients’ privacy. Policy makers discuss financing, insurance and costs so that innovations benefit all people. Many people hope that medical research will help them in the
target: future to prevent diseases or to treat them better.

context: Am Ende dieses Jahres merkt man, dass die Gesundheitsversorgung in den nächsten Jahren weiter wachsen wird. Die Informationen für Patienten sollen verständlicher werden, und Ärzte versuchen, mehr einfache Erklärungen und Broschüren zu verwenden. Insgesamt ist es eine spannende Zeit, in der
target: Technik und Medizin zusammenarbeiten, um das Leben der Menschen zu verbessern.

context: By the end of this year one notices that health care will continue to grow in the coming years. Information for patients should become clearer, and doctors try to use more simple explanations and brochures. Overall it is an exciting
target: time when technology and medicine work together to improve people’s lives.

context: Gleichzeitig gibt es Programme, die den Zugang zu gesundem Essen verbessern, besonders für Familien mit wenig Einkommen, ältere Menschen und Kinder in Schulen, damit niemand aus Kostengründen auf eine ausgewogene Ernährung verzichten muss. Wir müssen auch die Qualität der Lebensmittel kontrollieren, damit sie sicher sind und gesund bleiben. In vielen Regionen der Welt gibt
target: es Hunger oder Mangelernährung, deshalb fragt unsere Politik auch nach internationaler Hilfe und Zusammenarbeit.

context: We must also monitor the quality of food so that it is safe and remains healthy. In many regions of the world there is hunger or malnutrition, therefore our policy also asks for international aid and cooperation. The European Community tries to create clear rules for safety, hygiene, and
target: labeling of foods, so that consumers know exactly what they buy and eat.

context: Die Europäische Gemeinschaft versucht, klare Regeln für Sicherheit, Hygiene und Kennzeichnung von Lebensmitteln zu schaffen, damit Verbraucherinnen und Verbraucher genau wissen, was sie kaufen und essen. In Schulen, Kantinen und Gemeinden werden Lernprogramme angeboten, damit Kinder früh verstehen, warum Obst, Gemüse, Vollkorn und weniger Zucker wichtig sind, und wie man Lebensmittel sinnvoll verwendet, um Abfall zu vermeiden. Die Landwirtschaftspolitik unterstützt regionale Produkte, faire Preise für Bauern und
target: nachhaltige Anbaumethoden, damit frische Lebensmittel aus der Nähe kommen, Arbeitsplätze erhalten bleiben und Umweltbelastungen möglichst gering bleiben.

context: In schools, in canteens and in communities educational programs are offered so that children understand early why fruit, vegetables, whole grains and less sugar are important, and how to use food wisely to avoid waste. Agricultural policy supports regional products, fair prices for farmers, and sustainable farming methods, so fresh food from nearby sources remains available, jobs are preserved and environmental impacts kept as low as possible. In summary, the goal remains to secure a reliable supply of healthy
target: foods, stabilize prices, protect the farms, and enable all citizens to have good nutrition, even in times of economic change.

context: Die Einführung der ePA erfolgt schrittweise, und es braucht Zeit, bis alle Ärztinnen, Ärzte und Pflegekräfte sich daran gewöhnen. Gleichzeitig wächst die Bedeutung von Telemedizin, besonders in ländlichen Regionen, wo der Zugang zu Fachärzten begrenzt ist. Über das Internet können Spezialisten Patienten beraten, Bilder von Röntgenaufnahmen prüfen oder Diagnosen mit dem Hausarzt besprechen.
target: In der Notaufnahme unterstützen Telemedizin-Systeme den Ersthelfern, damit sie schneller eine richtige Entscheidung treffen.

context: At the same time, the importance of telemedicine is growing, especially in rural regions where access to specialists is limited. Over the Internet, specialists can advise patients, review images from X-rays, or discuss diagnoses with the family doctor. In the emergency department, telemedicine systems
target: support first responders so they can make quicker and correct decisions.

context: Eine weitere Entwicklung ist die Fernüberwachung von Patienten zu Hause; Blutzucker, Blutdruck und andere Werte können gemessen, gespeichert und sicher weitergegeben werden. Für Menschen mit chronischen Krankheiten bedeutet dies mehr Unabhängigkeit und eine bessere Kontrolle über den eigenen Gesundheitszustand. Gleichzeitig gibt es Fortschritte in der Chirurgie: Minimalinvasive Eingriffe werden
target: häufiger, Wunden heilen oft schneller und die Genesung ist in vielen Fällen kürzer.

context: Another development is home telemonitoring; blood sugar, blood pressure and other values can be measured, stored and securely transmitted. For people with chronic diseases, this means more independence and better control over their own health. At the same time, there are advances in surgery: minimally invasive procedures are
target: more common, wounds heal faster, and recovery is shorter in many cases.

context: In einigen Zentren wird sogar Robotik für Operationen genutzt, wobei der Chirurg an einer Konsole sitzt und präzise arbeiten kann. Auch in der Diagnostik gibt es Verbesserungen: Moderne bildgebende Verfahren liefern genauere Informationen, und neue Tests helfen schneller bei der richtigen Behandlung. Im Jahr 2006 diskutieren Experten über
target: Sicherheit, Qualität und Kosten von neuen Techniken, damit alle Menschen Nutzen davon haben.

context: In some centers, robotics are used for operations, with the surgeon at a console able to work with precision. Also in diagnostics there are improvements: modern imaging techniques provide more precise information, and new tests help with the right treatment faster. In 2006, experts discuss
target: safety, quality, and costs of new techniques so that everyone can benefit.

context: Die Zusammenarbeit von Ärztinnen und Ärzten, Pflegekräften, Apothekerinnen und Apotheker, Krankenkassen und der Politik ist wichtiger denn je, damit Innovationen gerecht verteilt werden. Letztlich soll die Medizin den Menschen helfen, länger gesund zu bleiben und besser zu leben, ohne die persönliche Beziehung zu Arzt und Pflege zu verlieren. Gern denke ich darüber nach, wie sich dieser Weg weiterentwickeln
target: wird, und ich hoffe, dass Mut, Geduld und verantwortungsbewusste Entscheidungen die Zukunft des Gesundheitswesens prägen.

context: The collaboration of doctors, nurses, pharmacists, health insurance companies, and politics is more important than ever so that innovations are distributed fairly. Ultimately, medicine should help people stay healthier for longer and live better, without losing the personal relationship with doctors and nurses. I often think about how this path will develop, and
target: I hope that courage, patience, and responsible decisions will shape the future of healthcare.

context: Heute schreibe ich am 04.06.2020 über neue Ideen im Gesundheitswesen. In vielen Ländern gibt es jetzt neue Technologien, die Ärzten und Patientinnen helfen. Die Telemedizin wird immer wichtiger: Patienten können per Video mit dem Arzt sprechen, ohne ins Krankenhaus zu
target: gehen. Das spart Zeit und reduziert das Risiko einer Ansteckung.

context: Today I am writing on 04.06.2020 about new ideas in healthcare. In many countries there are now new technologies that help doctors and patients. Telemedicine is becoming more and more important: patients can talk to the doctor via video without going to
target: the hospital. That saves time and reduces the risk of infection.

context: In Krankenhäusern gibt es neue Geräte, die Menschen schneller helfen. Die Fernüberwachung von Patienten ist möglich, so dass Ärztinnen auch von zu Hause aus sehen können, wie es dem Patienten geht. Künstliche Intelligenz wird genutzt, um Röntgenbilder schneller
target: zu prüfen. So bekommen Patienten oft früher eine richtige Diagnose.

context: In hospitals there are new devices that help people faster. Remote monitoring of patients is possible, so doctors can also from home see how the patient is doing. Artificial intelligence is used to check X-rays or scans
target: faster. This way patients often get a correct diagnosis earlier.

context: Wearables, wie Smartwatches oder Sensorarmbänder, messen Herzfrequenz, Schlaf und Bewegungen. Die gesammelten Daten helfen dem medizinischen Team, den Zustand eines Patienten zu erkennen und rechtzeitig zu handeln. In der Forschung arbeiten Wissenschaftlerinnen und
target: Wissenschaftler an Impfstoffen und neuen Medikamenten gegen verschiedene Krankheiten.

context: Wearables, such as smartwatches or sensor armbands, measure heart rate, sleep and movements. The collected data help the medical team to recognize the condition of a patient and to act in time. In research, scientists are
target: working on vaccines and new medicines against various diseases.

context: Die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Kliniken, Universitäten und Unternehmen wird wichtiger. 3D-Druck wird genutzt, um Prototypen oder Teile medizinischer Geräte schnell herzustellen. Es gibt auch neue Regeln: mehr Datenschutz, mehr Sicherheit, und der Patient hat mehr Kontrolle
target: über seine Daten. Insgesamt sehe ich viele positive Entwicklungen.

context: Cooperation between clinics, universities and companies becomes more important. 3D printing is used to quickly produce prototypes or parts of medical devices. There are also new rules: more data protection, more security, and the patient has more
target: control over their data. Overall I see many positive developments.

context: Sie könnten helfen, Kosten zu senken, Wartezeiten zu verkürzen und Krankheiten besser zu behandeln. Aber es gibt auch Herausforderungen: Der schnelle Wandel bedeutet, dass Ärztinnen neue Aufgaben lernen müssen und ältere Menschen manchmal Schwierigkeiten mit der Technik haben. Deshalb
target: ist Schulung wichtig und eine klare Kommunikation mit den Patientinnen.

context: They could help reduce costs, shorten waiting times and treat diseases better. But there are also challenges: the fast pace of change means that doctors must learn new tasks and that older people sometimes have difficulties with the
target: technology. Therefore training is important and clear communication with patients.

context: Wenn wir heute über Innovationen sprechen, darf man nicht vergessen, dass Gesundheit auch Menschlichkeit braucht. Technologie kann unterstützen, doch Vertrauen zwischen Arzt und Patient bleibt entscheidend. Ich hoffe, dass die Innovationen in
target: den kommenden Jahren weiter wachsen und allen Menschen zugutekommen.

context: When we talk about innovations today, we must not forget that health also needs humanity. Technology can support, but trust between doctor and patient remains decisive. I hope that innovations will continue to
target: grow in the coming years and benefit all people.

context: Heute, am 9. Mai 2012, spiegelt die Luftfahrtindustrie die Veränderungen der Jahre wider. Flugzeuge werden immer effizienter, und Triebwerke mit neuen Materialien versprechen weniger Treibstoffverbrauch und weniger Emissionen. In der Produktion arbeiten Unternehmen wie Airbus und Boeing an neuen
target: Modellen und an der Verbesserung der bestehenden Flügel- und Rumpfkonstruktionen.

context: Today, on May 9, 2012, the aviation industry reflects the changes of the years. Aircraft are becoming increasingly efficient, and engines with new materials promise lower fuel consumption and fewer emissions. In production, companies like Airbus and Boeing work on new models and on improving the existing wing and fuselage designs. Demand for air travel remains high, especially
target: in Asia and the Middle East, but the market in Europe is also growing again.

context: Die Nachfrage nach Flugreisen bleibt hoch, besonders in Asien und im Mittleren Osten, aber auch in Europa wächst der Markt wieder. Die Airlines versuchen, Kosten zu senken, indem sie effizientere Flotten beschaffen, Wartungsintervalle optimieren und neue Geschäftsmodelle testen. Ein wichtiger Trend ist die Umweltpolitik: Die Europäische Union führt in diesem Jahr das Emissionshandelssystem auch auf die Luftfahrt aus, und Fluggesellschaften bereiten sich darauf vor, Emissionen zu messen, zu berichten und zu bezahlen. Gleichzeitig fordern Regierungen
target: die Industrie auf, neue Kraftstoffe zu verwenden, die aus Biomasse oder recyceltem Material stammen, um den CO2-Ausstoß zu verringern.

context: Airlines try to reduce costs by procuring more efficient fleets, optimizing maintenance intervals, and testing new business models. A major trend is environmental policy: The European Union is introducing the emissions trading system also for aviation this year, and airlines are preparing to measure, report, and pay for their emissions. At the same time governments are urging the industry to use new fuels derived from biomass or recycled material to reduce CO2 emissions. Technically, engineers
target: are working on lighter materials, such as composite materials, and on more efficient engines that use significantly less fuel.

context: Technisch gesehen arbeiten Ingenieure an leichteren Materialien, zum Beispiel Verbundwerkstoffen, und an effizienteren Triebwerken, die deutlich weniger Treibstoff brauchen. Die Sicherheitsstandards bleiben hoch, und die Kontrollen in Flughafen- und Bordtechnik erreichen neue Stufen der Zuverlässigkeit. Im Wartungsbereich steigt die Bedeutung von Digitalisierung und Vernetzung: Diagnosesysteme
target: prüfen Maschinenzustände in Echtzeit, und Techniker können Probleme schneller erkennen und beheben.

context: Safety standards remain high, and checks in airport and on-board technology reach new levels of reliability. In the maintenance sector, the importance of digitalization and networking is rising: Diagnostic systems monitor machine states in real time, and technicians can detect and fix problems faster. For many
target: people, flying today means a daily, practical matter, not just an adventure.

context: Für viele Menschen bedeutet Fliegen heute eine tägliche, praktische Sache, nicht mehr nur ein Abenteuer. Gleichzeitig stehen Unternehmen vor Herausforderungen wie Preisschwankungen bei Kerosin, komplexen Lieferketten und der Notwendigkeit, qualifiziertes Personal zu finden. Wer die nächsten Jahre verfolgt, erkennt, dass die Luftfahrtbranche zwar robust ist,
target: jedoch ständig neue Lösungen braucht, um sicher, bezahlbar und umweltfreundlich zu bleiben.

context: At the same time, companies face challenges such as fluctuations in kerosene prices, complex supply chains, and the need to find qualified personnel. Whoever follows the next years will see that the aviation industry is robust yet constantly needs new solutions to stay safe, affordable, and environmentally friendly. So the look to the future remains—toward even more efficient airplanes, better
target: service offers at airports, and new ideas how people around the world can stay connected safely.

context: Auch das Internet gewinnt an Bedeutung: Viele Fans verfolgen Ergebnisse, Tabellen und Meldungen online. Sponsoren investieren mehr Geld in Teams, Wettbewerbe und Stadien, und Marken suchen Partner in Europa, Amerika und Asien. In der Bundesliga, in der Premier League und in der Primera

context: The voices of the last, of those who have not been heard, are made heard. People talk, write letters, organize petitions, hold peaceful demonstrations. Social justice means that the state must help the poor or those with few opportunities,
target: and that everyone has the same rights before the law.

context: Negli anni recenti, in molti paesi, si sentono voci per i diritti delle donne, dei bambini, dei rifugiati e delle minoranze. Per esempio, le donne chiedono pari salari, pari opportunità e protezione contro la violenza. I
target: bambini chiedono istruzione gratuita, sanità e tempo per giocare.

context: In recent years, in many countries, voices for the rights of women, children, refugees, and minorities can be heard. For example, women ask for equal salaries, equal opportunities, and protection against violence. Children ask
target: for free education, health care, and time to play.

context: I rifugiati chiedono protezione e una possibilità di ricominciare una nuova vita. I movimenti per i diritti umani hanno forme diverse: campagne, incontri pubblici, dibattiti, petizioni, giornali e Internet. L’idea è
target: di cambiare le leggi o di farle rispettare.

context: Refugees ask for protection and a chance to start a new life. Movements for human rights have different forms: campaigns, public meetings, debates, petitions, newspapers and the Internet. The idea
target: is to change laws or make them respected.

context: Se siamo rispettosi degli altri e difendiamo la dignità di ogni persona, stiamo costruendo una società migliore. Domani sarà importante continuare a lottare per i diritti umani e la giustizia sociale. Non
target: è facile, ma non è impossibile quando lavoriamo insieme.

context: If we respect others and defend the dignity of every person, we are building a better society. Tomorrow it will be important to continue to fight for human rights and social justice. It is not easy,
target: but it is not impossible when we work together.

context: 24 maggio 2001. Oggi penso a un'idea interessante: denaro digitale e registri contabili che non hanno bisogno di una banca tradizionale. Molte persone usano computer e
target: internet, e questo fa nascere nuove possibilità.

context: Today is May 24, 2001. I am thinking about an interesting idea: digital money and ledgers that do not need a traditional bank. Many people use computers and
target: the internet, and this creates new possibilities.

context: Alcuni esperti dicono che in futuro sarà possibile inviare soldi in modo rapido e sicuro, con pochi clic. Non servono contanti, né banconote: basta una chiave segreta che solo il proprietario conosce. Il denaro digitale potrebbe funzionare come una firma speciale: chi invia e chi riceve possono controllare rapidamente la transazione,
target: ma la registrazione resta pubblica per tutti, così non c'è furto o errore.

context: Some experts say that in the future it will be possible to send money quickly and securely, with a few clicks. Cash is not needed, neither notes: just a secret key that only the owner knows. Digital money could work like a special signature: the sender and the receiver can check the transaction quickly,
target: but the record remains public for everyone, so there is no theft or error.

context: Alcuni parlano di registri pubblici, dove le transazioni si registrano in ordine e non possono essere cambiate facilmente. Questa è l'idea di un libro contabile distribuito. Ogni partecipante ha una copia del
target: libro, e tutti controllano insieme che tutto sia corretto.

context: Some speak of public ledgers, where transactions are recorded in order and cannot be changed easily. This is the idea of a distributed ledger book. Each participant has a copy of the
target: book, and everyone checks together that everything is correct.

context: Per i mesi e gli anni futuri, questa idea potrebbe aiutare persone che non hanno banche vicine o che vogliono fare pagamenti internazionali veloci. Naturalmente ci sono domande: come proteggere le chiavi private, come evitare frodi, e chi paga i costi
target: del sistema. In questo periodo si cercano soluzioni semplici ma robuste.

context: For the months and years to come, this idea could help people who do not have banks nearby or who want to make fast international payments. Of course there are questions: how to protect private keys, how to avoid fraud, and who pays the costs of the
target: system. In this period people are looking for simple but robust solutions.

context: Io penso che, se queste idee funzioneranno, possono cambiare il modo in cui pensiamo al denaro. Ma ora siamo all'inizio: molte prove, poche certezze. È interessante seguire i lavori degli esperti e vedere come la tecnologia avanza. Scrivo queste poche righe per capire meglio cosa potrebbe arrivare nei prossimi
target: anni, e per ricordare che l'innovazione può nascere anche quando tutto sembra stabile.

context: I think that if these ideas work, they can change the way we think about money. But now we are at the beginning: many tests, few certainties. It is interesting to follow the
target: work of the experts and see how technology advances.

context: Oggi, 24 giugno 2005, scrivo una breve nota sul mercato dell'energia. I mercati stanno cambiando. In Europa e in Italia il mercato dell'energia elettrica e del gas diventa
target: più libero. Le aziende possono competere tra loro.

context: Today, June 24, 2005, I am writing a short note about the energy market. Markets are changing. In Europe and in Italy the electricity and gas market is
target: becoming freer. Companies can compete with each other.

context: Le famiglie possono scegliere da quale fornitore comprare l'energia. In molti paesi ci sono offerte diverse.
target: Le bollette mostrano i costi.

context: Families can choose from which supplier to buy energy. In many countries there are different offers.
target: Bills show the costs.

context: A volte i prezzi salgono, a volte scendono. Questo dipende dalla domanda e dall'offerta. Le regole
target: cercano di rendere tutto chiaro.

context: Sometimes prices go up, sometimes they go down. This depends on demand and supply. Rules try
target: to make everything clear.

context: Le autorità vogliono proteggere i consumatori. In Italia si lavora per aprire di più il mercato. I fornitori devono spiegare
target: i contratti in modo semplice.

context: Authorities want to protect consumers. In Italy work is being done to open the market more.
target: Suppliers must explain contracts simply.

context: I contratti dicono condizioni, tempi e penali. I clienti cercano tariffe trasparenti e buone. Molte
target: famiglie cercano tariffe migliori.

context: Contracts say conditions, timelines and penalties. Customers look for transparent and good tariffs. Many families
target: look for better tariffs.

context: Le imprese piccole guardano al risparmio energetico. I media parlano di liberalizzazione. Si discute di gas proveniente
target: da Russia e Nord Africa.

context: Small businesses look at energy saving. The media talk about liberalization. There is discussion about gas coming
target: from Russia and North Africa.

context: Si teme per la sicurezza delle forniture. Ma ci sono notizie positive. Ci sono investimenti in energie
target: rinnovabili come vento e sole.

context: There are fears about the security of supplies. But there is good news. There are investments in renewable energy
target: such as wind and sun.

context: Queste fonti danno energia pulita e riducono l'inquinamento. Non sono ancora grandi, ma crescono. Le soluzioni
target: per risparmiare energia sono utili.

context: These sources provide clean energy and reduce pollution. They are not yet large, but they are growing. Solutions
target: to save energy are useful.

context: Le persone possono spegnere le luci, usare meno acqua calda e scegliere lampadine efficienti. Inoltre, molte aziende cercano di offrire servizi migliori come assistenza clienti. Molti
target: consumatori cercano informazioni online e confrontano tariffe.

context: People can turn off lights, use less hot water, and choose efficient light bulbs. Also, many companies try to offer better services like customer support. Many consumers
target: look for information online and compare tariffs.

context: Le aziende aprono negozi e mostrano offerte vicino alle case. Si usano nuovi strumenti per seguire i consumi in tempo reale. Questa situazione offre opportunità ma richiede attenzione.
target: È importante leggere le condizioni prima di firmare.

context: Companies open shops and show offers near homes. New tools are used to track consumption in real time. This situation
target: offers opportunities but requires attention.

context: In Gaza molte case sono danneggiate, e le famiglie cercano pace e sicurezza. Le cause dei conflitti sono complesse: politica, economia e storia tra paesi diversi. Ma le conseguenze sono chiare: sofferenza dei civili, chiusura
target: delle scuole, perdita di lavoro e incertezza sul futuro.

context: In Gaza many houses are damaged, and families seek peace and safety. The causes of conflicts are complex: politics, economy and history among different countries. But the consequences are clear: civilian suffering, closed
target: schools, loss of jobs, and uncertainty about the future.

context: I governi cercano la pace e trattati, ma a volte le condizioni per un accordo duraturo mancano. I media mostrano immagini forti: bambini, anziani e famiglie che cercano riparo, persone che ricevono cibo e medicine. Per una persona che vive lontano, è facile
target: sentire la guerra lontana, ma è importante capire che riguarda tutti.

context: Governments seek peace and treaties, but sometimes the conditions for a lasting agreement are missing. The media show strong images: children, elderly people, and families seeking shelter, people who receive food and medicine. For a person who lives far away, it is easy to feel that the war
target: is distant, but it is important to understand that it concerns everyone.

context: Ogni piccolo gesto di solidarietà, come una donazione o una visita a chi soffre, può fare la differenza. Scrivo queste riflessioni per ricordare che la pace richiede pazienza, istruzione e fiducia tra i popoli. La pace non
target: arriva da sola, ma da molti piccoli passi ogni giorno.

context: It is clear that the road to peace is long and difficult, but not impossible. Every small gesture of solidarity, such as a donation or a visit to those who suffer, can make a difference. I write these reflections to
target: remember that peace requires patience, education, and trust among peoples.

context: Oggi è il 01.11.2007 e si parla molto di novità nella sanità. Le persone hanno accesso a nuove tecnologie che migliorano la cura. Negli ospedali si usano computer
target: e Internet per tenere le cartelle cliniche.

context: Today is 01.11.2007 and there is a lot of talk about new developments in health care. People have access to new technologies that improve care. In hospitals, computers and the
target: Internet are used to keep electronic medical records.

context: I laboratori hanno strumenti migliori per i controlli semplici e rapidi. I medici hanno accesso a nuove indicazioni grazie a banche dati e a linee guida aggiornate. Le famiglie hanno
target: più fiducia, perché le cure sono più sicure.

context: Laboratories have better tools for simple and fast checks. Doctors have access to new guidelines thanks to data banks and updated guidelines. Families have
target: more trust, because the treatments are safer.

context: Ma ci sono anche sfide: la privacy dei dati e i costi delle tecnologie. Le scuole e i centri di salute cercano di spiegare ai pazienti come usare queste idee. Nel prossimo anno ci saranno più
target: progetti di prevenzione, vaccini migliori, e programmi di informazione sanitaria.

context: But there are also challenges: data privacy and the costs of technologies. Schools and health centers try to explain to patients how to use these ideas. In the coming year there will be more
target: prevention projects, better vaccines, and programs of health information.

context: In conclusione, nel 2007 la sanità si muove con prudenza ma avanza con idee semplici e utili per tutti. Molti pazienti cercano di capire come prendersi cura della propria salute. Le persone imparano a usare le
target: informazioni semplici e chiedono aiuto ai dottori quando serve.

context: In conclusion, in 2007 health care moves with caution but advances with simple and useful ideas for everyone. Many patients try to understand how to take care of their own health. People learn to use simple
target: information and ask for help from doctors when needed.

context: Oggi è il 29 aprile 2021. Scrivo poche righe sul cambiamento climatico e sulle politiche ambientali. Il cambiamento climatico significa che il
target: clima della Terra cambia nel tempo.

context: Today is April 29, 2021. I am writing a few lines about climate change and environmental policies. Climate change means that the
target: Earth's climate is changing over time.

context: Le temperature sono alte in molti paesi. A volte ci sono periodi molto caldi e periodi freddi, ma il modello non è lo stesso
target: di prima. Le cause sono diverse.

context: Temperatures are high in many countries. Sometimes there are very hot periods and cold periods, but the pattern is not the same
target: as before. The causes are various.

context: L’uso di combustibili fossili, l’industria, i trasporti e la distruzione degli alberi sono problemi importanti. Per questo i governi cercano soluzioni. Le politiche ambientali cercano
target: di proteggere l’aria, l’acqua e la terra.

context: The use of fossil fuels, industry, transport, and the destruction of trees are important problems. For this reason governments seek solutions. Environmental policies aim
target: to protect the air, water, and land.

context: In Europa si parla molto di energia pulita. L’energia pulita viene dal sole, dal vento e dall’acqua. Se
target: usiamo energia pulita, l’inquinamento diminuisce.

context: In Europe there is much talk about clean energy. Clean energy comes from the sun, wind, and water. If we
target: use clean energy, pollution decreases.

context: Le case e le aziende possono avere pannelli solari o altre tecnologie. Le persone possono fare qualcosa di semplice: usare i mezzi pubblici, camminare a piedi, andare in bicicletta. Spegnere le
target: luci quando non servono, ridurre i rifiuti, riciclare.

context: Homes and companies can have solar panels or other technologies. People can do something simple: use public transport, walk, ride a bike. Turn off lights when
target: they are not needed, reduce waste, recycle.

context: Le scuole insegnano a risparmiare energia e a proteggere la natura. Le aziende cercano modi per essere più verdi. I governi propongono leggi e
target: piani per ridurre le emissioni di CO2.

context: Schools teach saving energy and protecting nature. Companies look for ways to be greener. Governments propose laws and
target: plans to reduce CO2 emissions.

context: Alcune leggi vogliono meno plastica e più riciclo. Altre promuovono la mobilità sostenibile, cioè muoversi in modo meno inquinante. L’accordo di Parigi è
target: importante, ma serve che tutti partecipino.

context: Some laws want less plastic and more recycling. Others promote sustainable mobility, that is moving in a less polluting way. The Paris Agreement is
target: important, but it needs everyone to participate.

context: Dal 2020 in poi si parla di investimenti in energia rinnovabile e in tecnologie pulite. Io credo che ognuno possa contribuire. Anche le scuole, le famiglie e i piccoli Comuni possono fare la differenza. È importante che i governi
target: parlino con i cittadini e ascoltino le idee delle comunità.

context: Since 2020 people talk about investments in renewable energy and clean technologies. I believe everyone can contribute. Schools, families, and small
target: towns can also make a difference.

context: Oggi, 28.09.2013, la filosofia e l'etica cercano di aiutarci a capire la vita in una società moderna. Nel mondo di oggi la tecnologia cambia molte cose. Abbiamo telefoni cellulari, internet e social
target: network. Queste cose ci connettono, ma creano anche problemi.

context: Today, 28.09.2013, philosophy and ethics try to help us understand life in a modern society. In today’s world technology changes many things. We have cell phones, the internet, and social networks. These
target: things connect us, but they also create problems.

context: Una domanda importante è: che cosa è giusto fare online? Quali azioni sono leali verso gli altri? Si discute la
target: privacy, la libertà e la responsabilità.

context: An important question is: what is the right thing to do online? Which actions are fair to others? People
target: discuss privacy, freedom, and responsibility.

context: Io penso che l'etica debba includere il rispetto per gli altri, anche quando siamo lontani. Le decisioni quotidiane mostrano chi siamo. La globalizzazione
target: porta idee nuove ma anche conflitti.

context: I think ethics should include respect for others, even when we are far away. Daily decisions show who we are. Globalization
target: brings new ideas but also conflicts.

context: In una città si incontrano culture diverse; questo è bello ma richiede tolleranza. La filosofia ci aiuta a pensare prima di agire. Le etiche moderne parlano di giustizia
target: sociale, diritti umani, sostenibilità e cura del pianeta.

context: In a city, different cultures meet; this is beautiful but requires tolerance. Philosophy helps us think before acting. Modern ethics talk about social justice, human
target: rights, sustainability, and care for the planet.

context: Per i giovani, la scuola e la famiglia hanno una grande responsabilità: educare al pensiero critico. In definitiva, la filosofia e l'etica ci accompagnano ogni giorno per vivere insieme in modo più umano. Le risposte non sono
target: sempre semplici, ma vale la pena chiedere, ascoltare e discutere.

context: For young people, school and family have a great responsibility: to educate critical thinking. In short, philosophy and ethics accompany us every day to live together in a more humane way. Answers are not always
target: simple, but it is worth asking, listening, and discussing.

context: Il 18 settembre 2019 scrivo questo testo sulle scoperte nel campo farmaceutico e biotecnologico. Gli scienziati cercano nuove medicine per curare malattie difficili. Le terapie sono diverse,
target: ma oggi si vedono grandi passi avanti.

context: On September 18, 2019 I am writing this text about discoveries in the pharmaceutical and biotechnological field. Scientists are seeking new medicines to cure difficult diseases. Therapies are
target: diverse, but today we see big steps forward.

context: Con CRISPR, i ricercatori possono cambiare una piccola parte del codice genetico. Le terapie CAR-T sono usate per combattere alcuni tipi di cancro. Quelle
target: terapie usano cellule del sistema immunitario.

context: With CRISPR, researchers can change a small part of the genetic code. CAR-T therapies are used to fight some types of cancer. Those therapies
target: use cells of the immune system.

context: Vaccini basati su RNA messaggero si studiano per diverse malattie. Questo lavoro riguarda anche la diagnostica. La diagnostica rapida aiuta i medici
target: a capire cosa hanno i pazienti.

context: Vaccines based on messenger RNA are studied for several diseases. This work also concerns diagnostics. Rapid diagnostics help
target: doctors understand what patients have.

context: Nei laboratori si usa la biologia molecolare. La sequenza del DNA e i dati dei pazienti guidano le scelte di cura. Le aziende biotecnologiche
target: collaborano con banche dati e università.

context: In laboratories molecular biology is used. The sequence of DNA and patient data guide treatment choices. Biotechnological companies
target: collaborate with databases and universities.

context: La medicina personalizzata usa le informazioni del paziente per scegliere la cura migliore. I ricercatori cercano anche farmaci con meno effetti collaterali. Si lavora per
target: rendere le terapie più facili da usare.

context: Personalized medicine uses the patient information to choose the best cure. Researchers also look for drugs with fewer side effects. Work is ongoing
target: to make therapies easier to use.

context: Ma la ricerca è lenta e costosa, e servono pazienza e controllo etico. La sicurezza dei pazienti è una priorità. Nel 2019, molti lavori in questa
target: area offrono promesse importanti per il futuro.

context: But research is slow and costly, and patience and ethical control are needed. Patient safety is a priority. In 2019, many works in this
target: area offer important promises for the future.

context: Per ora i progressi sono spesso lenti, ma la direzione è chiara. Questa evoluzione richiede regole chiare, cooperazione internazionale e investimenti pubblici. Il futuro della medicina sembra aprire
target: nuove strade per curare malattie prima incurabili.

context: For now progress is often slow, but the direction is clear. This evolution requires clear rules, international cooperation and public investments. The future of medicine seems to open
target: new paths to cure diseases once incurable.

context: 23.09.1995. Oggi molti esperti parlano di denaro digitale e di registri che si aggiornano in tempo reale. Le banche tradizionali hanno potere, ma
target: alcune persone vogliono pagare senza banche.

context: September 23, 1995. Today many experts talk about digital money and ledgers that update in real time. Traditional banks have power, but some
target: people want to pay without banks.

context: Un'idea interessante è la criptografia: una tecnologia per proteggere i pagamenti. Con questa idea, denaro digitale passa da una persona all’altra e resta registrato in un libro contabile che tutti possono controllare, ma non vedere facilmente chi paga. Alcuni parlano
target: di DigiCash, una moneta che si protegge con la crittografia.

context: An interesting idea is cryptography: a technology to protect payments. With this idea, digital money moves from one person to another and stays recorded in a ledger that everyone can check, but not easily see who pays. Some
target: talk about DigiCash, a money that is protected by cryptography.

context: Non è una moneta ufficiale, ma può rendere i pagamenti privati e sicuri. Le aziende di computer fanno programmi semplici che possono inviare denaro online senza usare banconote. La gente inizia a pensare a
target: una rete di computer che controlla insieme le transazioni.

context: It is not an official currency, but it can make payments private and secure. Computer companies make simple programs that can send money online without using banknotes. People are starting to think
target: of a network of computers that controls transactions together.

context: In questa rete, nessuna persona o banca decide tutto da sola. Il registro sarebbe condiviso e aggiornato da più computer. Tutti potrebbero
target: controllare che i pagamenti sono corretti.

context: In this network, no one person or bank decides everything alone. The ledger would be shared and updated by many computers. Everyone
target: could check that payments are correct.

context: Ci sono però problemi. Per usare questa idea servono regole chiare, fiducia nelle regole e protezione della privacy. Servono anche
target: fiducia nelle tecnologie e nei computer.

context: But there are problems. To use this idea, clear rules, trust in the rules, and privacy protection are needed. Also there must
target: be trust in technologies and computers.

context: Molti si chiedono se una forma di denaro digitale possa nascere senza governi o banche. Qualcuno dice che in futuro ci potrebbero essere sistemi aperti, dove chiunque può partecipare. Altri hanno paura delle
target: truffe, dei furti di identità e degli errori tecnici.

context: Many ask if a form of digital money could exist without governments or banks. Some say that in the future there could be open systems, where anyone can participate.
target: Others fear scams, identity theft, and technical errors.

context: Per ora si discute molto, si prova, si progetta, si discute su come le transazioni digitali potrebbero cambiare il modo in cui usiamo i soldi. Molti lettori sperano che queste idee diventino chiare e pratiche. Per ora
target: resta solo una discussione tra studiosi, studenti e persone curiose.

context: For now there is a lot of discussion, testing, designing, and debate about how digital transactions could change the way we use money. Many readers hope that these ideas become clear and practical. For now it
target: remains only a discussion among scholars, students, and curious people.

context: Oggi, 18 maggio 2008, leggo molte notizie su una possibile forma di denaro digitale. Alcune persone pensano a una valuta che esiste solo sul computer e che non ha una banca. Si parla di segretezza e di sicurezza, usando la crittografia per proteggere le transazioni. Molti credono che questa idea possa cambiare
target: il modo di pagare le cose: piccoli pagamenti, grandi acquisti, anche tra persone distanti.

context: Today, May 18, 2008, I read a lot about a possible form of digital money. Some people think of a currency that exists only on the computer and that has no bank. There is talk of secrecy and security, using cryptography to protect transactions. Many believe that this idea could change the way we
target: pay for things: small payments, large purchases, even between people who are far apart.

context: Un tema importante è la registrazione delle transazioni. Alcuni esperti dicono che potrebbe esserci un registro pubblico dove tutte le operazioni vengono annotate.
target: Nessuno controlla tutto da un’unica banca.

context: An important topic is the recording of transactions. Some experts say there could be a public ledger where all operations are recorded. No one
target: would control everything from a single bank.

context: Le persone parteciperebbero al sistema con i loro computer. In questo modo non serve una banca centrale. Questo è
target: molto curioso, ma anche difficile.

context: People would participate in the system with their computers. In this way, a central bank is not needed. This is
target: very interesting, but also difficult.

context: Quali norme servono per impedire problemi e abusi? I governi e le grandi aziende osservano queste idee con interesse. Alcuni pensano che, se funziona, potrebbe nascere
target: una nuova economia digitale aperta a chiunque.

context: What rules are needed to prevent problems and abuses? Governments and large companies watch these ideas with interest. Some think that if it works, a new digital
target: economy could be born open to everyone.

context: Ma in maggio 2008 molte persone attendono sviluppi concreti. Se arrivano, potrebbero cambiare il commercio online, i pagamenti internazionali e la fiducia tra le persone. Il tempo dirà se queste idee diventeranno realtà, e
target: come influiranno sul mondo della finanza e della tecnologia.

context: But in May 2008 many people await concrete developments. If they come, they could change online commerce, international payments, and trust among people. Time will tell if these ideas become reality, and how
target: they will influence the world of finance and technology.

context: Oggi è il 05.11.2009. Sto pensando a un problema importante: la scarsità d'acqua. La gestione delle
target: risorse idriche è necessaria.

context: Today is 05.11.2009. I am thinking about an important problem: water scarcity. The management of
target: water resources is necessary.

context: In molte parti del mondo l'acqua è poca. Non è sempre pulita. Le famiglie, le aziende e le comunità
target: devono usare l'acqua con attenzione.

context: In many parts of the world water is scarce. It is not always clean. Families, businesses and
target: communities must use water carefully.

context: Ci sono mesi secchi e mesi con tanta pioggia, ma la domanda di acqua è alta. Per questo serve migliorare la gestione delle risorse.
target: Le autorità costruiscono dighe, bacini e canali.

context: There are dry months and months with a lot of rain, but the demand for water is high. For this reason it is needed to improve the management
target: of resources. Authorities build dams, reservoirs and channels.

context: Ma le infrastrutture costano tempo e soldi. È importante risparmiare acqua anche nella vita quotidiana. Bisogna chiudere il rubinetto quando ci si
target: lava i denti. Usare rubinetti efficienti.

context: But infrastructure costs time and money. It is important to save water also in daily life. We must turn off
target: the tap when brushing our teeth.

context: Riutilizzare l'acqua piovana per l'irrigazione. Annaffiare in orari giusti. Le aziende possono usare tecnologie per ridurre le perdite nelle
target: reti e controllare i consumi.

context: Use efficient taps. Reuse rainwater for irrigation. Water plants at
target: the right times.

context: Le scuole fanno campagne di educazione sull'acqua. La gestione delle risorse idriche richiede cooperazione. Governi, imprese, agricoltori
target: e cittadini devono lavorare insieme.

context: Companies can use technologies to reduce losses in the networks and control consumption. Schools run education campaigns about water.
target: Managing water resources requires cooperation.

context: Se si prendono buone decisioni, si può avere acqua potabile per tutti e proteggere gli ecosistemi. È importante pensare al futuro: l'acqua non è infinita. La nostra responsabilità è grande. Questo testo vuole ricordare che, anche in tempi difficili, la prudenza e la
target: pianificazione sono utili per garantire che l'acqua arrivi dove serve domani.

context: Governments, companies, farmers and citizens must work together. If good decisions are made, there can be drinking water for everyone and ecosystems can be protected. It is important to
target: think about the future: water is not infinite.

context: Heute, am 2. Oktober 2012, schreibe ich diesen Text über Menschenrechte und soziale Gerechtigkeit. In vielen Ländern kämpfen Menschen dafür, dass Grundrechte wie Meinungsfreiheit,
target: Versammlungsfreiheit und faire Gerichte geschützt werden.

context: Today, on October 2, 2012, I am writing this text about human rights and social justice. In many countries people are fighting to protect basic rights such as freedom of expression, freedom of assembly, and fair courts. It is
target: also about equal opportunities, regardless of origin, gender, or religion.

context: Es geht auch um gleiche Chancen, unabhängig von Herkunft, Geschlecht oder Religion. Seit dem Arabischen Frühling in den Jahren 2010 und 2011 hat sich gezeigt, wie wichtig es ist, dass Menschen friedlich protestieren und von Regierungen gehört werden. In Ägypten, Tunesien und anderen Ländern haben
target: Millionen von Menschen demonstriert, weil sie bessere Lebensbedingungen und politische Teilhabe wollten.

context: Since the Arab Spring in 2010 and 2011, it has shown how important it is that people protest peacefully and are heard by governments. In Egypt, Tunisia, and other countries, millions of people demonstrated because they wanted better living conditions and political participation. In Europe and North America, many young people supported
target: the Occupy movement, which protested against too much inequality between rich and poor.

context: In Europa und Nordamerika haben viele junge Menschen die Occupy-Bewegung unterstützt, die gegen zu große Ungleichheit zwischen Arm und Reich protestiert. Soziale Gerechtigkeit bedeutet, dass alle Menschen gleiche Chancen bekommen – beim Zugang zu Bildung, Arbeit, Wohnung und Gesundheitsversorgung. Viele junge Menschen, Arbeiterinnen und Arbeiter,
target: Gewerkschaften und Nichtregierungsorganisationen arbeiten zusammen, um Druck auf Regierungen und Unternehmen auszuüben.

context: Social justice means that all people get equal opportunities—for access to education, work, housing, and healthcare. Many young people, workers, trade unions, and non-governmental organizations work together to put pressure on governments and companies. Yet there
target: are obstacles: censorship, political violence, corruption, or legal restrictions.

context: Dennoch gibt es Hindernisse: Zensur, politische Gewalt, Korruption oder rechtliche Beschränkungen. Berichte von Amnesty International, Human Rights Watch oder anderen Organisationen zeigen oft, dass Rechte verletzt werden, besonders in Krisenländern oder autoritären Staaten. Flüchtlinge, Frauen und Migrantinnen
target: und Migranten stehen oft vor großen Schwierigkeiten und brauchen Schutz.

context: Reports from Amnesty International, Human Rights Watch, or other organizations often show that rights are violated, especially in crisis countries or authoritarian states. Refugees, women and migrants often face great difficulties and need protection. Women’s rights
target: mean equal pay, secure jobs, and protection from violence.

context: Frauenrechte bedeuten weltweit gleichen Lohn, sichere Arbeitsplätze und Schutz vor Gewalt. Kinderrechte bedeuten Bildung, gutes Essen und eine sichere Umgebung. In vielen Ländern wird über all diese Themen öffentlich diskutiert, in
target: Schulen, in Zeitungen, im Fernsehen und im Netz.

context: Children’s rights mean education, good food, and a safe environment. In many countries people publicly discuss all these topics, in schools, in newspapers, on television, and online. Still there is hope: new technologies and social networks
target: allow people to connect, share information, and show solidarity.

context: Trotzdem bleibt Hoffnung: Neue Technologien und soziale Netzwerke ermöglichen es Menschen, sich zu vernetzen, Informationen zu teilen und Solidarität zu zeigen. Die Menschenrechte sind universell und gehören allen Menschen, egal wo sie leben. Die Aufgabe der Gesellschaft ist es, sie
target: zu schützen und allen Bürgerinnen und Bürgern gleiche Chancen zu geben.

context: Human rights are universal and belong to all people, no matter where they live. The task of society is to protect them and to give all citizens equal opportunities. If we think about it today, everyone can make a contribution, whether through a conversation, a
target: small help on site, a demonstration, or voluntary work in an NGO.

context: Im Laden nebenan gibt es viele neue elektronische Geräte. Die Werbung erzählt von besseren Bildern, klarerem Ton und leichterer Bedienung. Die Unterhaltungselektronik entwickelt sich
target: schnell, und ich merke es jeden Tag.

context: The advertisements speak of better pictures, clearer sound, and easier operation. The consumer electronics are developing quickly, and I notice it every day. In the shelves there are now portable music players, digital cameras, DVD recorders
target: and new flat-screen televisions next to the old CRT sets.

context: In den Regalen stehen jetzt tragbare Musikspieler, Digitalkameras, DVD-Recorder und neue Flachbildfernseher neben den alten Röhrenfernsehern. Der Markt ist viel größer geworden als vor zwei Jahren, und die Preise ändern sich ständig. Besonders der
target: MP3-Player ist in den letzten Monaten sehr beliebt geworden.

context: The market has become much larger than two years ago, and prices change constantly. Especially the MP3 player has become very popular in recent months. Many friends have already bought one, because
target: you can listen to your favorite music everywhere.

context: Viele Freunde haben schon einen gekauft, weil man seine Lieblingsmusik überall hören kann. Der erste iPod ist jetzt auch im Gespräch; er hat eine größere Festplatte und eine einfache Benutzung. Das gefällt vielen Käufern,
target: denn man muss nicht mehr so oft CDs wechseln.

context: The first iPod is now also in discussion; it has a larger hard drive and easy use. That pleases many buyers, because you do not have to change CDs so
target: often. The mobile phones have also become better.

context: Die Handys sind ebenfalls besser geworden. Jetzt haben viele Modelle Farbdisplays, mehrere Klingeltöne und sogar Kameras. Manche Handys können Fotos
target: senden oder im Internet suchen.

context: Now many models have color displays, several ringtones and even cameras. Some mobiles can send photos or search the Internet. That was
target: not so common two years ago.

context: Das war vor zwei Jahren noch nicht so üblich. Auch Computer werden schneller, aber oft auch teurer. Ein Laptop kostet heute weniger
target: als früher und hat mehr Arbeitsspeicher.

context: Computers are also faster, but often more expensive. A laptop today costs less than before and has more memory. At home one often wants a better DVD player or
target: a recorder so that one can record films.

context: Zu Hause möchte man oft einen besseren DVD-Player oder einen Recorder, damit man Filme aufnehmen kann. Die Fernbedienung wird manchmal kompliziert, aber viele Geräte arbeiten mit einer klaren Fernbedienung. Die Fachgeschäfte beraten
target: freundlich und zeigen, wie man die Geräte richtig benutzt.

context: The remote control can be a bit complicated, but many devices work with a clear remote. The specialty shops are friendly and show how to use the devices correctly. Still it is
target: not always easy to make the right decision.

context: Für den Alltag bedeuten diese Entwicklungen mehr Komfort, Zeitersparnis und Spaß. Aber man soll auch nicht zu viel Geld ausgeben. Wer kauft,
target: vergleicht sorgfältig und liest die Garantien.

context: But one should not spend too much money either. Whoever buys, compares carefully and reads the guarantees. So I think the market in Germany and worldwide will continue to grow, and it remains
target: exciting to watch how technology changes our daily life.

context: Viele Menschen bleiben lieber in ihrem eigenen Land und reisen mit dem Auto oder dem Zug für kurze Wochenendausflüge. Die Nachfrage nach Natur, Ruhe und regionalen Erlebnissen steigt. Hotels, Pensionen und Reisebüros arbeiten stärker mit flexiblen Stornierungen, klaren Hygieneregeln und sichtbaren Schutzmaßnahmen. Besucherinnen
target: und Besucher finden mehr Informationen zu Abständen, Maskenpflicht, Reinigung und Sicherheit.

context: The demand for nature, calm, and regional experiences is rising. Hotels, guesthouses, and travel agencies are working more with flexible cancellations, clear hygiene rules, and visible safety measures. Visitors find more information about distances, mask requirements, cleaning, and safety. Online
target: bookings, contactless payments, and digital check-in make traveling easier and safer.

context: Online-Buchungen, kontaktloses Bezahlen und digitaler Check-in machen das Reisen einfacher und sicherer. Die Branche setzt auch auf neue digitale Angebote wie virtuelle Führungen oder Online-Services, damit Kunden sich vorab gut informieren können. Nachhaltigkeit wird wichtiger: Weniger Flüge bedeuten weniger Umweltbelastung,
target: und Reisende suchen nach lokalen Produzenten, regionalen Produkten und nachhaltigen Angeboten.

context: The industry is also using new digital offerings like virtual tours or online services so customers can inform themselves well in advance. Sustainability becomes more important: fewer flights mean less environmental impact, and travelers look for local producers, regional products, and sustainable options. Smaller businesses like guesthouses,
target: family hotels, and local guides benefit from increased demand for authentic experiences.

context: Kleinere Betriebe wie Pensionen, Familienhotels und lokale Guides profitieren von der verstärkten Nachfrage nach authentischen Erlebnissen. Die Arbeitsplätze im Tourismus sind durch die Krise gefährdet, daher brauchen Hotels, Restaurants und Verkehr gute Zukunftsperspektiven und staatliche Unterstützung. Länder diskutieren
target: Hilfsprogramme und Investitionen in Sicherheit, damit Reisen wieder wachsen können.

context: Jobs in tourism are at risk due to the crisis, so hotels, restaurants, and transport need good prospects and government support. Countries discuss aid programs and investments in safety so that travel can grow again. Overall, travelers' goals
target: and expectations are changing: quality, safety, and trust are central.

context: Heute, am 8. April 2015, schreibe ich über Katastrophenhilfe und humanitäre Hilfe. Wenn Naturkatastrophen oder Konflikte passieren,
target: muss Hilfe schnell organisiert werden.

context: Today, on April 8, 2015, I am writing about disaster relief and humanitarian aid. When natural disasters or conflicts occur, aid must be organized quickly. Many organizations work
target: together: aid agencies, churches, clubs, and authorities.

context: In solchen Situationen zählt jede Stunde. Familien, Kinder und ältere Menschen brauchen Sicherheit, Schutz und Würde. Die Koordination
target: ist oft eine große Aufgabe.

context: Families, children, and older people need safety, protection, and dignity. Coordination is often a big task.
target: Which relief supplies come first?

context: Welche Hilfsgüter kommen zuerst? Wie kommen sie sicher an den Ort der Katastrophe?
target: Wie bleiben Informationen klar?

context: How can they reach the disaster site safely? How can information stay clear? Language, culture, and local conditions are also important
target: so that aid is used effectively.

context: Sprache, Kultur und lokale Gegebenheiten sind auch wichtig, damit Hilfe sinnvoll genutzt wird. Neben der Hilfe vor Ort gibt es Probleme wie schlechte Straßen, Transportprobleme, Stromausfälle und Platzmangel in
target: Notunterkünften. Trotzdem geben Helferinnen und Helfer nicht auf.

context: Besides aid on the ground there are problems like bad roads, transport issues, power outages, and a lack of space in emergency shelters. Still, helpers do not give up. They work long shifts, sometimes risk their
target: own safety, and hope that the situation will improve.

context: Sie arbeiten lange Schichten, riskieren manchmal eigene Sicherheit und hoffen, dass die Lage besser wird. Viele Menschen spenden Geld oder Kleidung, und viele melden sich als Freiwillige. Dadurch können Notunterkünfte eingerichtet, medizinische Behandlungen
target: organisiert und Schulen oder Kindergärten in Krisenzeiten geöffnet bleiben.

context: Many people donate money or clothes, and many sign up as volunteers. This makes it possible to set up emergency shelters, organize medical treatments, and keep schools or kindergartens open during crises. From these deployments
target: we learn a lot about humanity, solidarity, and respect.

context: Aus diesen Einsätzen lernen wir viel über Menschlichkeit, Solidarität und Respekt. Am Ende geht es darum, dass diejenigen, die alles verloren haben, wieder Hoffnung finden und ihr Leben Schritt für Schritt neu aufbauen können. Diese Aufgabe bleibt auch 2015
target: eine große Herausforderung, aber sie zeigt, wie wichtig Zusammenhalt ist.

context: In the end it is about those who have lost everything finding new hope and rebuilding their lives step by step. This task remains a big challenge in 2015 as well, but it shows how important solidarity is. In many countries there are
target: aid platforms on the Internet that collect donations and present projects.

context: In vielen Ländern gibt es Hilfsplattformen im Internet, die Spenden sammeln und Projekte vorstellen. Sie helfen Menschen, die richtigen Hilfsprojekte zu finden und zu unterstützen. Ich habe in
target: Berichten gesehen, wie lokale Gemeinden eigene Ressourcen mobilisieren.

context: They help people find and support the right relief projects. I have seen in reports how local communities mobilize their own resources. Also the media play a role because
target: they inform the public about needs and progress.

context: Auch die Medien spielen eine Rolle, denn sie informieren die Öffentlichkeit über Bedarf und Fortschritte. Wichtig ist, dass Hilfsbedürftige in Entscheidungen einbezogen werden, damit Hilfe dort ankommt, wo sie wirklich
target: gebraucht wird. So wird Katastrophenhilfe menschlich und verantwortungsvoll.

context: It is important that those in need are involved in decisions so that aid reaches where it is really needed. This is how disaster relief becomes humane and
target: responsible. Many people work to learn from mistakes.

context: Viele Menschen arbeiten daran, aus Fehlern zu lernen. In der Planung geht es um Lagerlogistik, saubere Wasserversorgung, Hygiene, Bildung und psychologische Unterstützung. Die Helfer müssen respektvoll mit
target: den Gemeinden arbeiten, damit das Vertrauen bleibt.

context: In planning the focus is on logistics, clean water supply, hygiene, education, and psychological support. The helpers must work respectfully with the communities so that trust remains. It is also important to support the
target: local economy so that jobs return after the crisis.

context: Es ist auch wichtig, die lokale Wirtschaft zu unterstützen, damit nach der Krise wieder Arbeitsplätze entstehen. Wenn verschiedene Länder zusammenhelfen, können größere Projekte umgesetzt werden. Die Geschichten der
target: Betroffenen erinnern uns daran, warum wir helfen.

context: When various countries work together, larger projects can be carried out. The stories of those affected remind us why we help.
target: Every contribution matters, big or small.

context: Jeder Beitrag hat eine Bedeutung, ob groß oder klein. Die Arbeit ist oft langwierig, doch die Hilfe kommt Schritt für Schritt an. Am Ende hoffen wir, dass weniger Menschen in Not leben
target: und dass Familien wieder ein normales Leben führen können.
